name: Orie
description:
Orie Ballardiae Harada (原田 織依「オリエ」・バラーディア), originally Orie Ballardiae (オリエ・バラーディア), is an Executor of Licht Kreis who sent to investigate the high influx of In-Birth activity in Kanzakai. She is one of the first twelve characters who debuted in UNDER NIGHT IN-BIRTH.

//I don't like Under Night In-Birth that much.I played it on PS Now several years back and it was kinda meh... the music goes hard though. And I did main some of the characters in MUGEN and Blazblue: Cross Tag Battle. Gordeau and Akatsuki FTW. I like Orie too because I'm a sucker for blue-haired chicks. (KOS-MOS, Esdeath, Aqua, and Dana Iclucia)

Avatar by gaien (jin morisono)
creator: AMultiverseAuthor
